response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software development with a focus on various technologies and a demonstrated ability to innovate and lead technical projects, relevant to the AI strategy role.
strengths: Proven experience in full-stack development and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong background in multiple programming languages and technologies
concerns: Lack of direct mention of AI or machine learning experience
No clear indication of cloud technology expertise
Limited evidence of direct experience in advising customers on AI adoption
